            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
        }
        add_technology = scout_plane2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_small_airframe â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_small_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = improved_small_airframe
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # aa_cannon_2 â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = aa_cannon_2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 25 }

            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"

# â”€â”€ AIR / HEAVY_FIGHTERS (12 techs) â”€â”€

# iw_medium_airframe
#   year=1926 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# heavy_fighter1
#   year=1936 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# basic_medium_airframe
#   year=1936 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# heavy_fighter2
#   year=1940 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_medium_airframe
#   year=1940 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_medium_airframe
#   year=1943 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# heavy_fighter3
#   year=1944 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# modern_medium_airframe
#   year=1945 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# modern_medium_airframe_2
#   year=1947 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# modern_medium_airframe_3
#   year=1950 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# modern_medium_airframe_4
#   year=1955 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# modern_medium_airframe_5
#   year=1960 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

arm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_extended_tech_tree_1960 = {
    # iw_medium_airframe â€” 1926
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = iw_medium_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1926 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = iw_medium_airframe
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # heavy_fighter1 â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = heavy_fighter1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
        }
        add_technology = heavy_fighter1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_medium_airframe â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_medium_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = basic_medium_airframe
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # heavy_fighter2 â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = heavy_fighter2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
        }
        add_technology = heavy_fighter2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_medium_airframe â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_medium_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = improved_medium_airframe
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_medium_airframe â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_medium_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_medium_airframe
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # heavy_fighter3 â€” 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = heavy_fighter3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
        }
        add_technology = heavy_fighter3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # modern_medium_airframe â€” 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = modern_medium_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = modern_medium_airframe
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # modern_medium_airframe_2 â€” 1947
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = modern_medium_airframe_2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1947 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = modern_medium_airframe_2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # modern_medium_airframe_3 â€” 1950
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = modern_medium_airframe_3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1950 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = modern_medium_airframe_3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # modern_medium_airframe_4 â€” 1955
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = modern_medium_airframe_4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1955 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = modern_medium_airframe_4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # modern_medium_airframe_5 â€” 1960
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = modern_medium_airframe_5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1960 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = modern_medium_airframe_5
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# â”€â”€ AIR / NAVAL_BOMBERS (6 techs) â”€â”€

# naval_bomber1
#   year=1936 branch=air category=naval_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# cv_naval_bomber1
#   year=1936 branch=air category=naval_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# naval_bomber2
#   year=1940 branch=air category=naval_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# cv_naval_bomber2
#   year=1940 branch=air category=naval_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# naval_bomber3
#   year=1944 branch=air category=naval_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# cv_naval_bomber3
#   year=1944 branch=air category=naval_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

arm_grant_air_naval_bombers_extended_tech_tree_1960 = {
    # naval_bomber1 â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = naval_bomber1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_bombers
        }
        add_technology = naval_bomber1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # cv_naval_bomber1 â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = cv_naval_bomber1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_bombers
        }
        add_technology = cv_naval_bomber1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # naval_bomber2 â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = naval_bomber2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_bombers
        }
        add_technology = naval_bomber2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # cv_naval_bomber2 â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = cv_naval_bomber2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_bombers
        }
        add_technology = cv_naval_bomber2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # naval_bomber3 â€” 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = naval_bomber3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_bombers
        }
        add_technology = naval_bomber3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # cv_naval_bomber3 â€” 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = cv_naval_bomber3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_bombers
        }
        add_technology = cv_naval_bomber3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# â”€â”€ AIR / STRATEGIC_BOMBERS (21 techs) â”€â”€

# iw_large_airframe

# strategic_bomber1

#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   year=1957 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# modern_large_airframe_5
#   year=1960 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

arm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_extended_tech_tree_1960 = {
    # iw_large_airframe â€” 1926
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = iw_large_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1926 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = iw_large_airframe
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # strategic_bomber1 â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = strategic_bomber1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
        }
        add_technology = strategic_bomber1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_large_airframe â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_large_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"

# â”€â”€ AIR / TACTICAL_BOMBERS (6 techs) â”€â”€

# early_bomber
#   year=1933 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# tactical_bomber1
#   year=1936 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# tactical_bomber2
#   year=1940 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# tactical_bomber3
#   year=1944 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# jet_tactical_bomber1
#   year=1945 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# jet_tactical_bomber2
#   year=1950 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

arm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_extended_tech_tree_1960 = {
    # early_bomber â€” 1933
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_bomber }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1933 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        add_technology = early_bomber
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tactical_bomber1 â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tactical_bomber1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        add_technology = tactical_bomber1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tactical_bomber2 â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tactical_bomber2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        add_technology = tactical_bomber2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tactical_bomber3 â€” 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tactical_bomber3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        add_technology = tactical_bomber3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # jet_tactical_bomber1 â€” 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = jet_tactical_bomber1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        add_technology = jet_tactical_bomber1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # jet_tactical_bomber2 â€” 1950
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = jet_tactical_bomber2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1950 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        add_technology = jet_tactical_bomber2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# â”€â”€ AIR / TRANSPORT (10 techs) â”€â”€

# early_transport_plane
#   year=1933 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# bba_early_transport_plane
#   year=1933 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# bba_improved_transport_plane
#   year=1936 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# improved_transport_plane
#   year=1940 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# bba_strategic_airlifter
#   year=1942 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# transport_plane_4
#   year=1945 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# strategic_airlifter
#   year=1948 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# transport_plane_5
#   year=1950 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# transport_plane_6
#   year=1955 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# transport_plane_7
#   year=1960 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

arm_grant_air_transport_extended_tech_tree_1960 = {
    # early_transport_plane â€” 1933
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_transport_plane }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1933 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
        }
        add_technology = early_transport_plane
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # bba_early_transport_plane â€” 1933
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = bba_early_transport_plane }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1933 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = bba_early_transport_plane
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # bba_improved_transport_plane â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = bba_improved_transport_plane }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = bba_improved_transport_plane
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_transport_plane â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_transport_plane }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
        }
        add_technology = improved_transport_plane
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # bba_strategic_airlifter â€” 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = bba_strategic_airlifter }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = bba_strategic_airlifter
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # transport_plane_4 â€” 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = transport_plane_4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = transport_plane_4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # strategic_airlifter â€” 1948
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = strategic_airlifter }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1948 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
        }
        add_technology = strategic_airlifter
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # transport_plane_5 â€” 1950
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = transport_plane_5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1950 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = transport_plane_5
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # transport_plane_6 â€” 1955
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = transport_plane_6 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1955 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = transport_plane_6
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # transport_plane_7 â€” 1960
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = transport_plane_7 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1960 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = transport_plane_7
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

arm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_extended_tech_tree_1960 = {
    # electronic_mechanical_engineering â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = electronic_mechanical_engineering }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = electronic_mechanical_engineering
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # radio â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = radio }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = radio
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # mechanical_computing â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = mechanical_computing }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics

arm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_extended_tech_tree_1960 = {
    # basic_fortification_tech â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_fortification_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }
        add_technology = basic_fortification_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # coastal_fort_tech_1 â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = coastal_fort_tech_1 }

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # agriculture_2 â€” 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = agriculture_2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }
        add_technology = agriculture_2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # flexible_line â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = flexible_line }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1943 }

            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }
        add_technology = agriculture_6
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# â”€â”€ INDUSTRY_ELECTRONICS / NUCLEAR (6 techs) â”€â”€

# atomic_research
#   year=1940 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# isotope_separation_centrifugal
#   year=1943 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# nuclear_reactor
#   year=1943 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# nuclear_reactor_heavy_water
#   year=1943 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# nukes
#   year=1945 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# thermonuclear_bombs
#   year=1950 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

arm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_extended_tech_tree_1960 = {
    # atomic_research â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = atomic_research }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = atomic_research
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # isotope_separation_centrifugal â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = isotope_separation_centrifugal }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = isotope_separation_centrifugal
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # nuclear_reactor â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = nuclear_reactor }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = nuclear_reactor
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # nuclear_reactor_heavy_water â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = nuclear_reactor_heavy_water }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = nuclear_reactor_heavy_water
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # nukes â€” 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = nukes }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = nukes
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # thermonuclear_bombs â€” 1950
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = thermonuclear_bombs }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1950 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = thermonuclear_bombs
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# â”€â”€ INDUSTRY_ELECTRONICS / RADAR (14 techs) â”€â”€

# radio_detection
#   year=1936 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# cavity_magnatron
#   year=1938 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# centimetric_radar
#   year=1940 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# phased_array
#   year=1941 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# monopulse_radar
#   year=1942 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# postwar_radar_tech_1
#   year=1944 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# postwar_radar_tech_2
#   year=1947 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# postwar_radar_tech_3
#   year=1950 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# air_air_missile_2
#   year=1950 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35 deps=[sp_rockets_improved_guidance_2]

# naval_chaff
#   year=1955 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# postwar_radar_tech_4
#   year=1955 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# air_air_missile_3
#   year=1955 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35 deps=[sp_rockets_improved_guidance_3]

# postwar_radar_tech_5
#   year=1960 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# air_air_missile_4
#   year=1960 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35 deps=[sp_rockets_improved_guidance_4]

arm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_extended_tech_tree_1960 = {
    # radio_detection â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = radio_detection }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        add_technology = radio_detection
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # cavity_magnatron â€” 1938
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = cavity_magnatron }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1938 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        add_technology = cavity_magnatron
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # centimetric_radar â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = centimetric_radar }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        add_technology = centimetric_radar
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # phased_array â€” 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = phased_array }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        add_technology = phased_array
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # monopulse_radar â€” 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = monopulse_radar }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        add_technology = monopulse_radar
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # postwar_radar_tech_1 â€” 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = postwar_radar_tech_1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        add_technology = postwar_radar_tech_1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # postwar_radar_tech_2 â€” 1947
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = postwar_radar_tech_2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1947 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        add_technology = postwar_radar_tech_2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # postwar_radar_tech_3 â€” 1950
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = postwar_radar_tech_3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1950 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        add_technology = postwar_radar_tech_3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # air_air_missile_2 â€” 1950
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = air_air_missile_2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1950 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
            has_tech = sp_rockets_improved_guidance_2
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = air_air_missile_2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # naval_chaff â€” 1955
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = naval_chaff }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1955 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        add_technology = naval_chaff
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # postwar_radar_tech_4 â€” 1955
    if = {

            NOT = { has_tech = postwar_radar_tech_4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1955 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        add_technology = postwar_radar_tech_4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # air_air_missile_3 â€” 1955
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = air_air_missile_3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }

            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }

            has_tech = sp_rockets_improved_guidance_3
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
            has_tech = sp_rockets_improved_guidance_4
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = air_air_missile_4

#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85 deps=[sp_rockets_improved_guidance_4]

arm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_extended_tech_tree_1960 = {
    # hardened_silo â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = hardened_silo }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = hardened_silo
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # motorized_rocket_unit â€” 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = motorized_rocket_unit }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
            has_tech = rocket_artillery
        }
        add_technology = motorized_rocket_unit
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # rocket_artillery â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = rocket_artillery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = rocket_artillery
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # rocket_artillery2 â€” 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = rocket_artillery2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = rocket_artillery2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # rocket_artillery3 â€” 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = rocket_artillery3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = rocket_artillery3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # experimental_rockets â€” 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = experimental_rockets }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = experimental_rockets
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # rocket_artillery4 â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = rocket_artillery4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = rocket_artillery4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_rockets_improved_guidance â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_rockets_improved_guidance }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1960 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = sp_flying_bomb_5
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_sam_missile_4 â€” 1960
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_sam_missile_4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1960 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = sp_sam_missile_4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_nuclear_missile_3 â€” 1960
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_nuclear_missile_3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1960 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = sp_nuclear_missile_3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_slbm_1 â€” 1960
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_slbm_1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1960 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = sp_slbm_1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # rocket_artillery_f â€” 1960
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = rocket_artillery_f }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1960 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
            has_tech = sp_rockets_improved_guidance_4
        }
        add_technology = rocket_artillery_f
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# â”€â”€ LAND / ANTI_AIR (13 techs) â”€â”€

# infantry_aa
#   year=1025 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15 deps=[sp_rockets_improved_guidance_4]

# interwar_antiair
#   year=1936 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair1
#   year=1939 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair2
#   year=1940 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair3
#   year=1941 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair4
#   year=1942 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair5
#   year=1943 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair_a
#   year=1944 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair_b
#   year=1947 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair_c
#   year=1949 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair_d
#   year=1950 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15 deps=[postwar_radar_tech_2]

# antiair_e
#   year=1955 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair_f
#   year=1960 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

arm_grant_land_anti_air_extended_tech_tree_1960 = {
    # infantry_aa â€” 1025
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = infantry_aa }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1025 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
            has_tech = sp_rockets_improved_guidance_4
        }
        add_technology = infantry_aa
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # interwar_antiair â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = interwar_antiair }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = interwar_antiair
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair1 â€” 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antiair1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = antiair1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair2 â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antiair2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = antiair2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair3 â€” 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antiair3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = antiair3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair4 â€” 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antiair4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = antiair4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair5 â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antiair5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = antiair5
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair_a â€” 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antiair_a }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = antiair_a
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair_b â€” 1947
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antiair_b }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1947 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = antiair_b
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair_c â€” 1949
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antiair_c }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1949 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air

        add_technology = antiair_c
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

    # antiair_d â€” 1950

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antiair_d }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1950 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
            has_tech = postwar_radar_tech_2
        }
        add_technology = antiair_d
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair_e â€” 1955
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antiair_e }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1955 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = antiair_e
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair_f â€” 1960
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antiair_f }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1960 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = antiair_f
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# â”€â”€ LAND / ANTI_TANK (14 techs) â”€â”€

#   year=1950 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antitank_e
#   year=1960 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

    # mountain_tanks â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = mountain_tanks }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = mountain_tanks
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # interwar_antitank â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = interwar_antitank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = interwar_antitank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SWE_bofors_antitank_gun â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = SWE_bofors_antitank_gun }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = SWE_bofors_antitank_gun
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antitank1 â€” 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antitank1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = antitank1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antitank2 â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antitank2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = antitank2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antitank3 â€” 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antitank3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = antitank3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antitank4 â€” 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antitank4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = antitank4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antitank5 â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antitank5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = antitank5
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antitank_a â€” 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antitank_a }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = antitank_a
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antitank_b â€” 1947
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antitank_b }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1947 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank

        add_technology = antitank_b
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

    # antitank_c â€” 1949

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1949 }

    # gw_artillery â€” 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = gw_artillery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1918 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = gw_artillery
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_battery â€” 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_battery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

# â”€â”€ LAND / HEAVY_TANKS (16 techs) â”€â”€

# basic_heavy_tank
#   year=1934 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_heavy_tank_chassis
#   year=1934 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_heavy_tank_chassis
#   year=1940 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_heavy_tank
#   year=1941 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# super_heavy_tank
#   year=1941 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_heavy_tank
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_heavy_tank_chassis
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# super_heavy_tank_chassis
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_naval_engine_conversion_tech
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_transmission_improvements_tech
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_specialized_field_manuals_tech
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_high_impact_obliterator_cannon_tech
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# heavy_tank_chassis_4
#   year=1945 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_weapon_fire_control_tech
#   year=1945 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# heavy_tank_chassis_5
#   year=1947 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# heavy_tank_chassis_6
#   year=1950 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

arm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_extended_tech_tree_1960 = {
    # basic_heavy_tank â€” 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_heavy_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
        }
        add_technology = basic_heavy_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_heavy_tank_chassis â€” 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_heavy_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = basic_heavy_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_heavy_tank_chassis â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_heavy_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = improved_heavy_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_heavy_tank â€” 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_heavy_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
        }
        add_technology = improved_heavy_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # super_heavy_tank â€” 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = super_heavy_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
        }
        add_technology = super_heavy_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_heavy_tank â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_heavy_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
        }
        add_technology = advanced_heavy_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_heavy_tank_chassis â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_heavy_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_heavy_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # super_heavy_tank_chassis â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = super_heavy_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = super_heavy_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_armored_lc_naval_engine_conversion_tech â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_armored_lc_naval_engine_conversion_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = sp_armored_lc_naval_engine_conversion_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_armored_lc_transmission_improvements_tech â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_armored_lc_transmission_improvements_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }

    }
    # sp_armored_lc_specialized_field_manuals_tech â€” 1943

            NOT = { has_tech = sp_armored_lc_specialized_field_manuals_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }

            NOT = { has_tech = heavy_tank_chassis_6 }

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1950 }

            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = heavy_tank_chassis_6
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_infantry_extended_tech_tree_1960 = {
    # infantry_weapons â€” 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = infantry_weapons }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1918 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = infantry_weapons
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # support_weapons â€” 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = support_weapons }

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # urban_specialization â€” 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = urban_specialization }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1945 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = urban_specialization
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # wilderness_specialization â€” 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = wilderness_specialization }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1945 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = wilderness_specialization
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # support_weapons5 â€” 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = support_weapons5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1945 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = support_weapons5
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # marines_a â€” 1947
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = marines_a }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1947 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = marines_a
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # infantry_equipment_4 â€” 1947

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = infantry_equipment_4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1947 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = infantry_equipment_4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # mountaineers_a â€” 1947
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = mountaineers_a }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1947 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry

        add_technology = mountaineers_a

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
