# â”€â”€ LAND / LIGHT_TANKS (11 techs) â”€â”€

# gwtank
#   year=1918 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# gwtank_chassis
#   year=1918 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# basic_light_tank
#   year=1934 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# basic_light_tank_chassis
#   year=1934 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# improved_light_tank
#   year=1936 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# improved_light_tank_chassis
#   year=1936 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# paradrop_tank_chassis
#   year=1938 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35 deps=[paras_airborne_light_armor]

# advanced_light_tank
#   year=1941 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# advanced_light_tank_chassis
#   year=1941 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# modern_light_tank_chassis
#   year=1950 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# paradrop_tank_chassis_2
#   year=1950 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35 deps=[paradrop_tank_chassis]

arm_grant_land_light_tanks_extended_tech_tree_1960 = {
    # gwtank â€” 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = gwtank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1918 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = gwtank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # gwtank_chassis â€” 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = gwtank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1918 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = gwtank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_light_tank â€” 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_light_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = basic_light_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_light_tank_chassis â€” 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_light_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = basic_light_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_light_tank â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_light_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = improved_light_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_light_tank_chassis â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_light_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = improved_light_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # paradrop_tank_chassis â€” 1938
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = paradrop_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1938 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_tech = paras_airborne_light_armor
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = paradrop_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_light_tank â€” 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_light_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = advanced_light_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_light_tank_chassis â€” 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_light_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_light_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # modern_light_tank_chassis â€” 1950
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = modern_light_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1950 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = modern_light_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # paradrop_tank_chassis_2 â€” 1950
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = paradrop_tank_chassis_2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1950 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_tech = paradrop_tank_chassis
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = paradrop_tank_chassis_2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# â”€â”€ LAND / MECHANISED (11 techs) â”€â”€

# mechanised_infantry
#   year=1940 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# amphibious_mechanized_infantry
#   year=1941 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# mechanised_infantry2
#   year=1942 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# amphibious_mechanized_infantry_2
#   year=1943 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# mechanised_infantry3
#   year=1944 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# mechanised_infantry4
#   year=1947 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# mechanised_infantry5
#   year=1950 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# mechanised_infantry6
#   year=1953 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# amphibious_mechanized_infantry_3
#   year=1953 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# mechanised_infantry7
#   year=1960 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# ifv_infantry
#   year=1960 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

arm_grant_land_mechanised_extended_tech_tree_1960 = {
    # mechanised_infantry â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = mechanised_infantry }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = mechanised_infantry
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # amphibious_mechanized_infantry â€” 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = amphibious_mechanized_infantry }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = amphibious_mechanized_infantry
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # mechanised_infantry2 â€” 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = mechanised_infantry2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = mechanised_infantry2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # amphibious_mechanized_infantry_2 â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = amphibious_mechanized_infantry_2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = amphibious_mechanized_infantry_2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # mechanised_infantry3 â€” 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = mechanised_infantry3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = mechanised_infantry3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # mechanised_infantry4 â€” 1947
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = mechanised_infantry4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1947 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = mechanised_infantry4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # mechanised_infantry5 â€” 1950
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = mechanised_infantry5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1950 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = mechanised_infantry5
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # mechanised_infantry6 â€” 1953
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = mechanised_infantry6 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1953 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = mechanised_infantry6
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # amphibious_mechanized_infantry_3 â€” 1953
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = amphibious_mechanized_infantry_3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1953 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = amphibious_mechanized_infantry_3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # mechanised_infantry7 â€” 1960
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = mechanised_infantry7 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1960 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = mechanised_infantry7
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ifv_infantry â€” 1960
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ifv_infantry }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1960 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = ifv_infantry
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# â”€â”€ LAND / MEDIUM_TANKS (9 techs) â”€â”€

# basic_medium_tank_chassis
#   year=1938 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# basic_medium_tank
#   year=1939 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_medium_tank_chassis
#   year=1940 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_medium_tank
#   year=1941 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_medium_tank
#   year=1943 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_medium_tank_chassis
#   year=1943 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# main_battle_tank_chassis_2
#   year=1947 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# main_battle_tank_chassis_3
#   year=1950 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# main_battle_tank_chassis_4
#   year=1960 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

arm_grant_land_medium_tanks_extended_tech_tree_1960 = {
    # basic_medium_tank_chassis â€” 1938
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_medium_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1938 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = basic_medium_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_medium_tank â€” 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_medium_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
        }
        add_technology = basic_medium_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_medium_tank_chassis â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_medium_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = improved_medium_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_medium_tank â€” 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_medium_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
        }
        add_technology = improved_medium_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_medium_tank â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_medium_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
        }
        add_technology = advanced_medium_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_medium_tank_chassis â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_medium_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_medium_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # main_battle_tank_chassis_2 â€” 1947
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = main_battle_tank_chassis_2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1947 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = main_battle_tank_chassis_2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # main_battle_tank_chassis_3 â€” 1950
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = main_battle_tank_chassis_3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1950 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = main_battle_tank_chassis_3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # main_battle_tank_chassis_4 â€” 1960
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = main_battle_tank_chassis_4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1960 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = main_battle_tank_chassis_4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# â”€â”€ LAND / MODERN_TANKS (2 techs) â”€â”€

# main_battle_tank
#   year=1945 branch=land category=modern_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# main_battle_tank_chassis
#   year=1945 branch=land category=modern_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

arm_grant_land_modern_tanks_extended_tech_tree_1960 = {
    # main_battle_tank â€” 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = main_battle_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_modern_tanks
        }
        add_technology = main_battle_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # main_battle_tank_chassis â€” 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = main_battle_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_modern_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = main_battle_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# â”€â”€ LAND / MOTORISED (4 techs) â”€â”€

# tech_trucks
#   year=1936 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# motorised_infantry
#   year=1936 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# motorised_infantry_2
#   year=1941 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# motorised_infantry_3
#   year=1950 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

arm_grant_land_motorised_extended_tech_tree_1960 = {
    # tech_trucks â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_trucks }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised
        }
        add_technology = tech_trucks
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # motorised_infantry â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = motorised_infantry }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised
        }
        add_technology = motorised_infantry
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # motorised_infantry_2 â€” 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = motorised_infantry_2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised
        }
        add_technology = motorised_infantry_2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # motorised_infantry_3 â€” 1950
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = motorised_infantry_3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1950 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised
        }
        add_technology = motorised_infantry_3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# tech_military_police6
#   year=1955 branch=land category=support
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# tech_maintenance_company6
#   year=1955 branch=land category=support
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# tech_logistics_company6
#   year=1955 branch=land category=support
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# tech_signal_company6
#   year=1955 branch=land category=support
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# diesel_electric_locomotives
#   year=1955 branch=land category=support
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# tech_field_hospital6
#   year=1955 branch=land category=support
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=15 deps=[health_5]

arm_grant_land_support_extended_tech_tree_1960 = {
    # basic_train â€” 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_train }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1910 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = basic_train
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_support â€” 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_support }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1918 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = tech_support
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_engineers â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_engineers }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = tech_engineers
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_recon â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_recon }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = tech_recon
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_military_police â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_military_police }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = tech_military_police
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_maintenance_company â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_maintenance_company }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = tech_maintenance_company
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # armored_train â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = armored_train }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = armored_train
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_recon_focus_bonus â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_recon_focus_bonus }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = tech_recon_focus_bonus
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_field_hospital â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_field_hospital }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            has_tech = motorised_infantry
            has_tech = health_1
        }
        add_technology = tech_field_hospital
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_logistics_company â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_logistics_company }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            has_tech = motorised_infantry
        }
        add_technology = tech_logistics_company
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_signal_company â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_signal_company }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            has_tech = radio
            has_tech = motorised_infantry
        }
        add_technology = tech_signal_company
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_armored_engineer_tech â€” 1938
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_armored_engineer_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1938 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = sp_armored_engineer_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_armored_maintenance_tech â€” 1938
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_armored_maintenance_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1938 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = sp_armored_maintenance_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_armored_signal_tech â€” 1938
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_armored_signal_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1938 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = sp_armored_signal_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_helicopter_transport_pods_tech â€” 1938
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_helicopter_transport_pods_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1938 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = sp_helicopter_transport_pods_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_helicopter_artillery_observers_tech â€” 1938

            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_extended_tech_tree_1960 = {
    # armored_car1 â€” 1914
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = armored_car1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1914 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = armored_car1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_light_td â€” 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_light_td }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = basic_light_td
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_light_art â€” 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_light_art }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic

        add_technology = basic_light_art

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # armor_tech_3 â€” 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = armor_tech_3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = armor_tech_3

# â”€â”€ NAVAL / BATTLESHIPS (25 techs) â”€â”€

# early_battlecruiser
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# early_battleship
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# early_ship_hull_heavy
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_battleship
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# heavy_battleship
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_ship_hull_heavy
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# ship_hull_super_heavy
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_heavy_armor_scheme
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70 [XP_GATED]

# pre_dreadnoughts
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# coastal_defense_ships
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_ship_hull_heavy
#   year=1939 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# ship_hull_super_heavy_2
#   year=1939 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_heavy_armor_scheme
#   year=1939 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70 [XP_GATED]

# basic_battlecruiser
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_battleship
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_ship_hull_heavy
#   year=1943 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_battleship
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# heavy_battleship2
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# ship_hull_heavy_5
#   year=1954 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# ship_asm_battery_1_tech
#   year=1955 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# ship_sam_missile_battery_1_tech
#   year=1955 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# ship_dp_missile_battery_1_tech
#   year=1955 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70 deps=[ship_sam_missile_battery_1_tech, ship_asm_battery_1_tech]

# ship_dp_missile_battery_2_tech
#   year=1955 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70 deps=[ship_sam_missile_battery_2_tech, ship_asm_battery_2_tech]

# ship_asm_battery_2_tech
#   year=1960 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70 deps=[sp_rockets_improved_guidance_4]

# ship_sam_missile_battery_2_tech
#   year=1960 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70 deps=[sp_rockets_improved_guidance_4]

arm_grant_naval_battleships_extended_tech_tree_1960 = {
    # early_battlecruiser â€” 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_battlecruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        add_technology = early_battlecruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_battleship â€” 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_battleship }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        add_technology = early_battleship
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_ship_hull_heavy â€” 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_ship_hull_heavy }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = early_ship_hull_heavy
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_battleship â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_battleship }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        add_technology = basic_battleship
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # heavy_battleship â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = heavy_battleship }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        add_technology = heavy_battleship
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_ship_hull_heavy â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_ship_hull_heavy }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = basic_ship_hull_heavy
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ship_hull_super_heavy â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ship_hull_super_heavy }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = ship_hull_super_heavy
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): basic_heavy_armor_scheme
    # pre_dreadnoughts â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = pre_dreadnoughts }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }

            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"

# â”€â”€ NAVAL / CARRIERS (14 techs) â”€â”€

# early_carrier
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# early_ship_hull_carrier
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_carrier
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_ship_hull_carrier
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# ship_hull_escort_carrier
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_ship_hull_carrier
#   year=1939 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_carrier
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_refined_pykrete
#   year=1942 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_ship_hull_carrier
#   year=1943 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_ice_composite_runawayas
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_carrier
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# ship_hull_carrier_4
#   year=1949 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# ship_hull_carrier_5
#   year=1954 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# ship_hull_carrier_6
#   year=1958 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

arm_grant_naval_carriers_extended_tech_tree_1960 = {
    # early_carrier â€” 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
        }
        add_technology = early_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_ship_hull_carrier â€” 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_ship_hull_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = early_ship_hull_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_carrier â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
        }
        add_technology = basic_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_ship_hull_carrier â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_ship_hull_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = basic_ship_hull_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ship_hull_escort_carrier â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ship_hull_escort_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = ship_hull_escort_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_ship_hull_carrier â€” 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_ship_hull_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = improved_ship_hull_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_carrier â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
        }
        add_technology = improved_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_refined_pykrete â€” 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_refined_pykrete }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = sp_refined_pykrete
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_ship_hull_carrier â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_ship_hull_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_ship_hull_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_ice_composite_runawayas â€” 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_ice_composite_runawayas }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = sp_ice_composite_runawayas
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_carrier â€” 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
        }
        add_technology = advanced_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ship_hull_carrier_4 â€” 1949
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ship_hull_carrier_4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1949 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = ship_hull_carrier_4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ship_hull_carrier_5 â€” 1954
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ship_hull_carrier_5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1954 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = ship_hull_carrier_5
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ship_hull_carrier_6 â€” 1958
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ship_hull_carrier_6 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1958 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = ship_hull_carrier_6
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# depth_charges_7
#   year=1958 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25 [XP_GATED]

arm_grant_naval_destroyers_extended_tech_tree_1960 = {
    # early_destroyer â€” 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_destroyer }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
        }
        add_technology = early_destroyer
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_ship_hull_light â€” 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_ship_hull_light }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = early_ship_hull_light
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # smoke_generator â€” 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = smoke_generator }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = smoke_generator
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): basic_depth_charges
    # sonar â€” 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sonar }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = sonar
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_destroyer â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_destroyer }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
        }
        add_technology = basic_destroyer
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_ship_hull_light â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_ship_hull_light }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = basic_ship_hull_light
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): improved_depth_charges
    # improved_sonar â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_sonar }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = improved_sonar
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_ship_hull_light â€” 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_ship_hull_light }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = improved_ship_hull_light
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): advanced_depth_charges
    # improved_destroyer â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_destroyer }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
        }
        add_technology = improved_destroyer
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_sonar â€” 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_sonar }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_sonar
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_ship_hull_light â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_ship_hull_light }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_ship_hull_light
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): modern_depth_charges
    # advanced_destroyer â€” 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_destroyer }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
        }
        add_technology = advanced_destroyer
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ship_hull_light_5 â€” 1949
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ship_hull_light_5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1949 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = ship_hull_light_5
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): depth_charges_5
    # modern_sonar â€” 1950
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = modern_sonar }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1950 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

    # ship_hull_light_6 â€” 1954
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ship_hull_light_6 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1954 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = ship_hull_light_6
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): depth_charges_6
    # ship_hull_light_7 â€” 1958
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ship_hull_light_7 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1958 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = ship_hull_light_7
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # towed_sonar â€” 1958
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = towed_sonar }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1958 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = towed_sonar
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): depth_charges_7
}

# â”€â”€ NAVAL / HEAVY_CRUISERS (5 techs) â”€â”€

# early_heavy_cruiser
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# basic_cruiser_armor_scheme
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 [XP_GATED]

# basic_heavy_cruiser
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_heavy_cruiser
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_heavy_cruiser
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

arm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_extended_tech_tree_1960 = {
    # early_heavy_cruiser â€” 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_heavy_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = early_heavy_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): basic_cruiser_armor_scheme
    # basic_heavy_cruiser â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_heavy_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = basic_heavy_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_heavy_cruiser â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_heavy_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = improved_heavy_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_heavy_cruiser â€” 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_heavy_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = advanced_heavy_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# â”€â”€ NAVAL / LIGHT_CRUISERS (12 techs) â”€â”€

# early_light_cruiser
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# early_ship_hull_cruiser
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# basic_light_cruiser
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# basic_ship_hull_cruiser
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_ship_hull_cruiser
#   year=1939 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_light_cruiser
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_ship_hull_cruiser
#   year=1943 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_light_cruiser

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

#   year=1949 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# ship_hull_cruiser_6
#   year=1954 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# ship_hull_helicopter_carrier
#   year=1954 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 deps=[early_ship_hull_carrier, naval_helicopter_1]

# ship_hull_cruiser_7
#   year=1958 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

arm_grant_naval_light_cruisers_extended_tech_tree_1960 = {
    # early_light_cruiser â€” 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_light_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = early_light_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_ship_hull_cruiser â€” 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_ship_hull_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = early_ship_hull_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_light_cruiser â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_light_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = basic_light_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_ship_hull_cruiser â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_ship_hull_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = basic_ship_hull_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_ship_hull_cruiser â€” 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_ship_hull_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = improved_ship_hull_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_light_cruiser â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_light_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = improved_light_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_ship_hull_cruiser â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_ship_hull_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_ship_hull_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_light_cruiser â€” 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_light_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = advanced_light_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ship_hull_cruiser_5 â€” 1949
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ship_hull_cruiser_5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1949 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = ship_hull_cruiser_5
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ship_hull_cruiser_6 â€” 1954
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ship_hull_cruiser_6 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1954 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = ship_hull_cruiser_6
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ship_hull_helicopter_carrier â€” 1954
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ship_hull_helicopter_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1954 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
            has_tech = early_ship_hull_carrier
            has_tech = naval_helicopter_1
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = ship_hull_helicopter_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ship_hull_cruiser_7 â€” 1958
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ship_hull_cruiser_7 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1958 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = ship_hull_cruiser_7
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

arm_grant_naval_naval_support_extended_tech_tree_1960 = {
    # transport â€” 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = transport }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
        }
        add_technology = transport
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_torpedo â€” 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_torpedo }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = basic_torpedo
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_naval_mines â€” 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_naval_mines }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }

    # landing_platform_helicopter â€” 1960
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = landing_platform_helicopter }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1960 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = landing_platform_helicopter
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

arm_grant_naval_submarines_extended_tech_tree_1960 = {
    # early_submarine â€” 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_submarine }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
        }
        add_technology = early_submarine
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_ship_hull_submarine â€” 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_ship_hull_submarine }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = early_ship_hull_submarine
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # midget_submarine â€” 1922

            NOT = { has_tech = midget_submarine }

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
